title: cicuta douglasii
intro: Cicuta douglasii, also known as Douglas' sweet cicely or Western sweet cicely, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cicuta douglasii include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, or used fresh in salads and as a garnish, although it's worth noting that large doses can be toxic, so proper preparation and dosage are essential.
